recommendations.title: No manches, Frida
recommendations.overview: After being released from prison, Zequi, a bank robber, sets out to recover money buried by his accomplice; but is horrified to learn that a high school gymnasium is now over the site where the loot is hidden.

recommendations.title: Off Course
recommendations.overview: Two young Spanish men, with a university education, are tired of unemployment and decide to move to Germany. But soon they will find out that finding a better living is not as easy as they expected.

recommendations.title: A Stroke of Luck
recommendations.overview: Villaviciosa de al Lado is a peaceful town stuck in time, living exclusively of the fame of a 200 years-old spa. Therefore, city hall's debts threatens to close the spa and ruin all town. Their salvation becomes when suddenly mayor Anselmo and the re

recommendations.title: Project X
recommendations.overview: Three high school seniors throw a party to make a name for themselves. As the night progresses, things spiral out of control as word of the party spreads.

recommendations.title: The Hangover
recommendations.overview: When three friends finally come to after a raucous night of bachelor-party revelry, they find a baby in the closet and a tiger in the bathroom. But they can't seem to locate their best friend, Doug – who's supposed to be tying the knot. Launching a f

recommendations.title: Paddington 2
recommendations.overview: Paddington, now happily settled with the Browns, picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy, but it is stolen.

recommendations.title: 50 First Dates
recommendations.overview: Henry is a player skilled at seducing women. But when this veterinarian meets Lucy, a girl with a quirky problem when it comes to total recall, he realizes it's possible to fall in love all over again…and again, and again. That's because the delightf

recommendations.title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
recommendations.overview: Three friends who were inseparable in childhood decide to go on a three-week-long bachelor road trip to Spain, in order to re-establish their bond and explore thrilling adventures, before one of them gets married. What will they learn of themselves a

recommendations.title: The Full House
recommendations.overview: Antoine, a bachelor party-goer, gets new roommates: Jeanne and her two children.

recommendations.title: Project Almanac
recommendations.overview: A group of teens discover secret plans of a time machine, and construct one. However, things start to get out of control.
